name: fsd-booking-e2e
description: End-to-end + UI/UX quality automation for the FSD Booking System. Drives the SPA through the core booking flow (functional regression guards) and audits every page for product-grade UI quality: blank-screen/console/network health, layout overflow, responsive breakpoints, accessibility (axe WCAG 2.1 AA), and visual regression (light + dark).
